TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: batad nu wali (kamu nu Hulam: ťĀ†śĚĪ ) u katinengan nu salengacay a tademaw i "tipay" . u batad nu wali hananay ku sawalian nu "nutipan nu Europe" . i tepal ku "untipan nu Europe" , u "tepalay a wali" hananay. izaw ku "nuwalian nu O-Cuo" (East Europe, śĚĪś≠ź), "nuwalitimulan nu Europe" , "nuamisan nu Africa " atu Turkey . u "inutebanan nu walian" hananay izaw ku "nuwalian nu Africa" , Li-Fan-Te (ťĽéŚá°ÁČĻ, Lavent ), A-La-Po pangkiw a subal atu "inutebanan nu Asia" . "batad nu wali" saan sa, namaka kakitidaan atu kitakit nu European a tademaw , u lala' i batad nu wali mueneng ku takuliyaway a tademaw . sakawalian sabataday a China , Korea North , atu Japan , u "nuwalian nu Asia" hananay. sisa u batad nu wali saan sa. izaw ku henay Siberia , u "nuamisan nu Asia" hananay, atu "walitimulan nu Asia" .
S.PHON: batad nu war~…ĺi (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ** ) u katin…ôŇčan nu sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj a tad…ômaw i "tipaj" . u batad nu war~…ĺi ńßananaj ku sawar~…ĺian nu "nutipan nu …ôurop…ô" . i t…ôpar~…ĺ ku "untipan nu …ôurop…ô" , u "t…ôpar~…ĺaj a war~…ĺi" ńßananaj. izaw ku "nuwar~…ĺian nu o- ¶uo" (…ôast …ôurop…ô, **), "nuwar~…ĺitimur~…ĺan nu …ôurop…ô" , "nuamisan nu afri ¶a " atu turk…ô . u "inut…ôbanan nu war~…ĺian" ńßananaj izaw ku "nuwar~…ĺian nu afri ¶a" , r~…ĺi-fan-t…ô (***, r~…ĺa*…ônt ), a-r~…ĺa-po paŇčkiw a subar~…ĺ atu "inut…ôbanan nu asia" . "batad nu war~…ĺi" saan sa, namaka kakitidaan atu kitakit nu …ôurop…ôan a tad…ômaw , u r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° i batad nu war~…ĺi mu…ôn…ôŇč ku takur~…ĺijawaj a tad…ômaw . sakawar~…ĺian sabatadaj a ¶ńßina , kor…ôa nortńß , atu *apan , u "nuwar~…ĺian nu asia" ńßananaj. sisa u batad nu war~…ĺi saan sa. izaw ku ńß…ônaj sib…ôria , u "nuamisan nu asia" ńßananaj, atu "war~…ĺitimur~…ĺan nu asia" .
S.FORM: batad nu wali (kamu nu Hulam: ťĀ†śĚĪ ) u katinengan nu salengacay a tademaw i "tipay" . u batad nu wali hananay ku sawalian nu "nutipan nu Europe" . i tepal ku "untipan nu Europe" , u "tepalay a wali" hananay. izaw ku "nuwalian nu O-Cuo" (East Europe, śĚĪś≠ź), "nuwalitimulan nu Europe" , "nuamisan nu Africa " atu Turkey . u "inutebanan nu walian" hananay izaw ku "nuwalian nu Africa" , Li-Fan-Te (ťĽéŚá°ÁČĻ, Lavent ), A-La-Po pangkiw a subal atu "inutebanan nu Asia" . "batad nu wali" saan sa, namaka kakitidaan atu kitakit nu European a tademaw , u lala' i batad nu wali mueneng ku takuliyaway a tademaw . sakawalian sabataday a China , Korea North , atu Japan , u "nuwalian nu Asia" hananay. sisa u batad nu wali saan sa. izaw ku henay Siberia , u "nuamisan nu Asia" hananay, atu "walitimulan nu Asia" .
S.PHON: batad nu war~…ĺi (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ** ) u katin…ôŇčan nu sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj a tad…ômaw i "tipaj" . u batad nu war~…ĺi ńßananaj ku sawar~…ĺian nu "nutipan nu …ôurop…ô" . i t…ôpar~…ĺ ku "untipan nu …ôurop…ô" , u "t…ôpar~…ĺaj a war~…ĺi" ńßananaj. izaw ku "nuwar~…ĺian nu o- ¶uo" (…ôast …ôurop…ô, **), "nuwar~…ĺitimur~…ĺan nu …ôurop…ô" , "nuamisan nu afri ¶a " atu turk…ô . u "inut…ôbanan nu war~…ĺian" ńßananaj izaw ku "nuwar~…ĺian nu afri ¶a" , r~…ĺi-fan-t…ô (***, r~…ĺa*…ônt ), a-r~…ĺa-po paŇčkiw a subar~…ĺ atu "inut…ôbanan nu asia" . "batad nu war~…ĺi" saan sa, namaka kakitidaan atu kitakit nu …ôurop…ôan a tad…ômaw , u r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° i batad nu war~…ĺi mu…ôn…ôŇč ku takur~…ĺijawaj a tad…ômaw . sakawar~…ĺian sabatadaj a ¶ńßina , kor…ôa nortńß , atu *apan , u "nuwar~…ĺian nu asia" ńßananaj. sisa u batad nu war~…ĺi saan sa. izaw ku ńß…ônaj sib…ôria , u "nuamisan nu asia" ńßananaj, atu "war~…ĺitimur~…ĺan nu asia" .
